description: Replication of H1 (CPA < 0.15) on Pythia-1.4B-deduped trained on The Pile, using the same TruthfulQA contrastive pair protocol as the GPT-2-XL baseline.
result: H1 confirmed on both architectures. CPA < 0.15 for GPT-2-XL (0.0666) and Pythia-1.4B (0.1005). Probe-circuit misalignment replicates across training corpora.
paper_sentence: CPA~0 replicates across two architectures trained on different corpora (GPT-2-XL on WebText: CPA=0.0666; Pythia-1.4B on The Pile: CPA=0.1005).
